observed_failure: crossing_cart aborted at step 71 with one physical overlap; straight root speed was about 1.8 times measured wheel odometry
root_cause: World used physics_dt=0.01 and rendering_dt=0.05. A rendered World.step advanced five physics substeps, then four additional non-rendered steps were executed, producing nine physics steps per declared 0.05 second control period.
repair: World rendering_dt now equals physics_dt=0.01. Each 20 Hz control cycle executes one rendered plus four non-rendered physics steps. A frozen root-path/wheel-odometry ratio gate detects recurrence.
